frontmatter.description: A pod has remained in Pending state past the operational threshold

signature.embedding_seed: pod pending unschedulable resource quota node selector

body:
## When this fires
A pod has been stuck in Pending for more than 2 minutes. Typical causes: no node satisfies the selector or taints, the resource quota is exhausted, the image is still pulling, or a PVC is unbound.

## Playbook
1. Pull pod-events for the scheduler's reason (Unschedulable, FailedScheduling, etc.).
2. Run pod-describe to inspect requests, selectors, tolerations, and volumes.
3. Cross-reference node-capacity to confirm available CPU/memory headroom.

## Common confusion
This is *not* [[pod-oom-killed]]: that fires after a pod has run and exceeded memory; this fires before the pod ever runs.
